# theory

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Music-theory primitives for Sonata: the chord vocabulary (quality↔intervals↔symbol) and a chord-symbol parser shared by chord analyzers and chord-authoring sources.
- Core:
  - Exports: Types: `ChordTemplate`; Values: `CHORD_TEMPLATES`, `formatChordSymbol`, `parseChordSymbol`, `PC_NAMES`, `qualitySymbol`, `qualityToIntervals`
